subject: Write architecture document (1-2 pages)
description:
Spec requires 5 sections:
1. System Architecture - frontend, data layer, AI content pipeline, how 3 pages share data
2. Trust Model Design - formula, inputs, display across pages
3. Instrumentation Strategy - 7 event types, why each matters, how to use them
4. AI Usage Log - how AI was used during dev, what worked/failed
5. Design Decisions - key tradeoffs (Vite vs CRA, JSON fixtures vs API, SPA vs SSR)

Write to `docs/architecture.md`. 1-2 pages.
